MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via ZOOM videoconference:
Thomas Purtell, Esq., Tel. 415.722.6291, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Alexander MacDougall, Esq., Tel. 925.825.9716, appearing for the Defendant.

Matter called. The Court states that the matters appeared to be unopposed.

Discussions regarding DEFENDANT MICHAEL THOMAS' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES are held.

Mr. Purtell states that the parties met and conferred on the motions, that there is an upcoming trial date, and that they will move for a continuance of the trial. The parties agree to continue the depositions. The depositions will be required to take place on or before January 15, 2022. Sanctions will be conditioned upon appearances at those depositions. Mr. MacDougall is to prepare a form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and then submit the order to Judge Pro Tem Renne at Rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: J. Alameda, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
